## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass with `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Frontend builds with `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation links were checked
- [ ] Screenshots were added or updated for UI changes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private URLs, or local files were committed

## Notes

Add any reviewer notes, rollout steps, or known limitations.
